content: I re-checked PR 349 at the refreshed head. The good news is the substantive bar issue looks fixed now: the structure controls are routed through the shared sheet-mutation path instead of directly mutating `state.cells`. The remaining blocker is mechanical but real: GitHub still reports the branch as `DIRTY`, so I cannot clear it to merge until that is resolved. If that status does not clear on its own, please take one more rebase/conflict pass on the same PR and re-request review.
